classifications.phrase: maintain the cash rate target at 10 basis points
cease further purchases under the bond purchase program
spending is expected to pick up as case numbers trend lower
GDP growth of around 4¼ per cent over 2022
unemployment rate declining to 4.2 per cent in December
high numbers of job vacancies suggest further gains in employment
unemployment rate to fall to below 4 per cent later in the year
A further pick-up in wages growth is expected as the labour market tightens
Inflation has picked up more quickly than the RBA had expected
underlying inflation to increase further in coming quarters to around 3¼ per cent
faster-than-expected progress has been made towards the RBA's goals
it will not increase the cash rate until actual inflation is sustainably within the 2…
it is too early to conclude that it is sustainably within the target band
The Board is prepared to be patient

payload.rationale: The RBA signals a gradual tightening bias by ending QE while maintaining dovish forward guidance, acknowledging faster inflation than expected but emphasizing patience pending sustained inflation within target and modest wage growth.
